introSection: The Riddler Revenge is a Vekoma suspended looping coaster located at Six Flags New England in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The roller coaster opened on May 24, 1997 as Mind Eraser.

In 2017, Samsung Gear VR virtual reality headsets were used to offer the Galactic Attack Virtual Reality Coaster. The next year, the track was repainted green, the supports were repainted yellow, new trains with vest restraints were added, and the ride received its current name.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: For the 2017 season, the original Vekoma trains were replaced with lighter ones also from the same company.

fullText:
The Riddler Revenge is a Vekoma suspended looping coaster located at Six Flags New England in Agawam, Massachusetts, USA.

The roller coaster opened on May 24, 1997 as Mind Eraser.

In 2017, Samsung Gear VR virtual reality headsets were used to offer the Galactic Attack Virtual Reality Coaster. The next year, the track was repainted green, the supports were repainted yellow, new trains with vest restraints were added, and the ride received its current name.



For the 2017 season, the original Vekoma trains were replaced with lighter ones also from the same company.
